14 #include <algorithm>

16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ArrayUtils.h"
17 
18 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 
20 using namespace Arcane;
21 
22 BEGIN_ALIEN_NAMESPACE
23 
24 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
25 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
26 
27 AnyItemAbstractFamily::
28 AnyItemAbstractFamily(const Arcane::AnyItem::Family & family,
29  IIndexManager * manager)
30  : m_family(family)
31  , m_manager(manager)
32 {
33  Int64 max_unique_id = 0;
34  m_lower_bounds.resize(m_family.groupSize()+1);
35  for(Integer igrp=0;igrp<m_family.groupSize();++igrp)
36  {
37  Arcane::ItemGroup group = m_family.group(igrp);
38  m_lower_bounds[igrp] = m_family.firstLocalId(group);
39  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem, group)
40  {
41  max_unique_id = std::max(max_unique_id, iitem->uniqueId().asInt64());
42  }
43  }
44  Integer max_local_id = m_family.maxLocalId();
45  if ((max_local_id & ~m_item_unique_id_mask) != 0)
46  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Too large item unique ids in AnyItem::Family");
47  m_lower_bounds[m_family.groupSize()] = max_local_id;
48  if (m_family.groupSize() > (1<<m_group_bit_size))
49  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Too many groups in AnyItem::Family");
50 }
51 
52 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
53 
54 AnyItemAbstractFamily::
55 ~AnyItemAbstractFamily()
56 {
57  m_manager->keepAlive(this);
58 }
59 
60 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
61 
62 void
63 AnyItemAbstractFamily::
64 uniqueIdToLocalId(Int32ArrayView localIds, Int64ConstArrayView uniqueIds) const
65 {
66  ARCANE_ASSERT((localIds.size() == uniqueIds.size()),("Incompatible array argument sizes"));
67  const Integer size = uniqueIds.size();
68 
69  // AnyItem uid -> igrp + item unique id
70  SharedArray<Int32> group_ids(size); // tableau m�morisant dans de quel groupe est issu l'item � la m�me position
71  SharedArray<SharedArray<Int64> > unique_id_by_groups(m_family.groupSize());
72  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
73  { // Classe les uids par leur groupe sous-jacent avant d'appeler les m�thodes par IItemFamily
74  Int64 uniqueId = uniqueIds[i];
75  Integer igrp = _get_igroup(uniqueId);
76  Int64 item_uid = _get_item_unique_id(uniqueId);
77  group_ids[i] = igrp;
78  unique_id_by_groups[igrp].add(item_uid);
79  }
80 
81  // item unique id -> item local id
82  SharedArray<SharedArray<Int32> > local_id_by_groups(m_family.groupSize());
83  for(Integer igrp=0;igrp<m_family.groupSize();++igrp)
84  {
85  local_id_by_groups[igrp].resize(unique_id_by_groups[igrp].size());
86  if (not local_id_by_groups[igrp].empty())
87  {
88  Arcane::ItemGroup group = m_family.group(igrp);
89  Arcane::IItemFamily * family = group.itemFamily();
90  family->itemsUniqueIdToLocalId(local_id_by_groups[igrp], unique_id_by_groups[igrp], true); // do_fatal = true
91  }
92  }
93  unique_id_by_groups.dispose();
94 
95  // item local id -> AnyItem local id
96  SharedArray<Integer> current_indexes(m_family.groupSize(), 0);
97  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
98  {
99  const Integer group_id = group_ids[i];
100  Arcane::ItemGroup group = m_family.group(group_id);
101  const Int32 item_lid = local_id_by_groups[group_id][current_indexes[group_id]++];
102  const Integer local_index = (*(group.localIdToIndex()))[item_lid];
103  localIds[i] = m_lower_bounds[group_id] + local_index;
104  }
105 }
106 
107 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
108 
109 IIndexManager::IAbstractFamily::Item
110 AnyItemAbstractFamily::
111 item(Int32 localId) const
112 {
113  ARCANE_ASSERT((localId < m_family.maxLocalId()),("Bad Abstract Family localId"));
114  Integer igrp = ArcGeoSim::ArrayScan::dichotomicIntervalScan(localId, m_lower_bounds.size(), m_lower_bounds.unguardedBasePointer());
115  ARCANE_ASSERT((igrp < m_family.groupSize()),("Invalid group index"));
116  Arcane::ItemVectorView view = m_family.group(igrp).view();
117  Arcane::Item item = view[localId - m_lower_bounds[igrp]];
118  return IAbstractFamily::Item(_form_unique_id(igrp, item.uniqueId()),
119  item.owner());
120 }
121 
122 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
123 
124 SafeConstArrayView<Integer>
125 AnyItemAbstractFamily::
126 owners(Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const
127 {
128  const Integer size = localIds.size();
129  SharedArray<Integer> result(size);
130  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
131  {
132  Int32 localId = localIds[i];
133  ARCANE_ASSERT((localId < m_family.maxLocalId()),("Bad Abstract Family localId"));
134  Integer igrp = ArcGeoSim::ArrayScan::dichotomicIntervalScan(localId, m_lower_bounds.size(), m_lower_bounds.unguardedBasePointer());
135  ARCANE_ASSERT((igrp < m_family.groupSize()),("Invalid group index"));
136  Arcane::ItemVectorView view = m_family.group(igrp).view();
137  Arcane::Item item = view[localId - m_lower_bounds[igrp]];
138  result[i] = item.owner();
139  }
140  return result;
141 }
142 
143 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
144 
145 SafeConstArrayView<Int64>
146 AnyItemAbstractFamily::
147 uids(Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const
148 {
149  const Integer size = localIds.size();
150  SharedArray<Int64> result(size);
151  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
152  {
153  Int32 localId = localIds[i];
154  ARCANE_ASSERT((localId < m_family.maxLocalId()),("Bad Abstract Family localId"));
155  Integer igrp = ArcGeoSim::ArrayScan::dichotomicIntervalScan(localId, m_lower_bounds.size(), m_lower_bounds.unguardedBasePointer());
156  ARCANE_ASSERT((igrp < m_family.groupSize()),("Invalid group index"));
157  Arcane::ItemVectorView view = m_family.group(igrp).view();
158  Arcane::Item item = view[localId - m_lower_bounds[igrp]];
159  result[i] = _form_unique_id(igrp, item.uniqueId());
160  }
161  return result;
162 }
163 
164 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
165 
166 SafeConstArrayView<Int32>
167 AnyItemAbstractFamily::
168 allLocalIds() const
169 {
170  const Integer size = m_family.maxLocalId();
171  SharedArray<Int32> local_ids(size);
172  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
173  local_ids[i] = i;
174  return local_ids;
175 }
176 
177 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
178 
179 END_ALIEN_NAMESPACE
